content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix against the current file state:

**Fix 1 (Card family migration):** The Card usage at lines 340-348 is already correct v6 structure (`Card > CardHeader > CardTitle`, `Card > CardBody`). The Card import is already present. The `isFlat`, `isRounded`, etc. removed props are not used. The type change from `FunctionComponent` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent` is a library-side change — no code change needed in this file. **Already compatible.**

**Fix 2 (RowProps type change):** `RowProps` is imported at line 19 and used at line 212. The type change adds `index` and `onSelect?` fields. The component destructures `{ obj, activeColumnIDs }` — it doesn't use the new fields, so it's compatible. However, I should verify if `index` is now required (non-optional). Looking at the step 4: `index: number` is required, `onSelect?: OnSelect` is optional. Since `LUNGroupRow` destructures only `obj` and `activeColumnIDs`, and the `index` field would be provided by the `VirtualizedTable` caller, this is fine. **No code change needed for this type-compatible expansion.**

**Fix 3 & Fix 5 (CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed):** Both fixes target the same lines (161, 177). The class `pf-v5-u-color-200` needs to be removed. Looking at line 161, it currently reads `"pf-v6-u-ml-sm pf-v5-u-color-200"` — the `pf-v5-u-ml-sm` was already migrated to `pf-v6-u-ml-sm` in a previous pass, but `pf-v5-u-color-200` remains because there's no v6 equivalent. I need to remove `pf-v5-u-color-200`. The PatternFly v6 equivalent for color utility classes would be using `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` or similar, but since the rule says to remove it, I'll use `pf-v6-u-color-200` doesn't exist, so I should just use a suitable replacement. The `pf-v5-u-color-200` was a muted text color. In PF v6, I can use `pf-v6-u-text-color-subtle` or just remove the class. Since the rule says "Remove this class reference or replace with custom CSS", I'll remove just that class portion.

**Fix 4 (Tooltip behavioral change):** This is an informational warning about Tooltip's Popper appendTo default change. No code change needed in the source file — this affects tests only, and there are no companion test files listed.

**Fix 6 (TextVariants → ContentVariants):** `TextVariants` is imported at line 35 and used at line 303. Replace with `ContentVariants`.

**Fix 7 (Text → Content):** `Text` is imported at line 36 and used at line 303. Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>`.

**Fix 8 (TextContent → Content):** `TextContent` is imported at line 34 and used at line 302/318. Replace `<TextContent>` with `<Content>`. But wait — both Fix 7 and Fix 8 say to replace with `<Content>`. Since `TextContent` was a wrapper and `Text` was the actual text element, in PF v6, `Content` replaces both. The `<Content component={ContentVariants.h2}>` replaces `<Text component={TextVariants.h2}>`, and the outer `<TextContent>` wrapper can become `<Content>` or be removed since `Content` in v6 is self-contained.

Actually, looking at the PF v6 migration more carefully: `<TextContent>` was just a wrapper `<div>` with text styles. In v6, `<Content>` replaces both `<Text>` and `<TextContent>`. The pattern `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.h2}>...</Text></TextContent>` becomes `<Content component="h2">...</Content>`.

Let me apply all changes:

arguments.after:
Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
  pluralize,
  Content,
  ContentVariants,
  Tooltip,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before:
Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
  pluralize,
  TextContent,
  TextVariants,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after: ), }, { title: t('Console link'), transforms: [sortable], props: { className: tableColumnInfo[3].className, }, id: tableColumnInfo[3].id, header: ( {t('Console link')}
arguments.before: ), }, { title: t('Console link'), transforms: [sortable], props: { className: tableColumnInfo[3].className, }, id: tableColumnInfo[3].id, header: ( {t('Console link')}

content.text: Now replace the `<TextContent>` and `<Text>` usage in the JSX:

arguments.after: {t('{{ lunGroups }} connected', { lunGroups: pluralize( connectedLUNGroups?.length || 0, t('LUN group') ), })}
arguments.before: {t('{{ lunGroups }} connected', { lunGroups: pluralize( connectedLUNGroups?.length || 0, t('LUN group') ), })}

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:
The file looks correct. All changes have been applied cleanly. Let me verify there are no remaining references to the old imports or classes:

No remaining references to the old identifiers or removed CSS classes. The file is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Card family migration (line 29, 340)
**No change needed.** The Card usage already follows correct v6 composition (`Card > CardHeader > CardTitle`, `Card > CardBody`). No removed props (`isFlat`, `isRounded`, etc.) are used. The library-side type change (`FunctionComponent` → `ForwardRefExoticComponent`) requires no consumer code changes. `CardBody` and `CardFooter` are already imported (CardBody) or not needed (CardFooter).

### Fix 2 — RowProps type change (lines 19, 212)
**No change needed.** The `RowProps` type gained new fields (`index: number`, `onSelect?: OnSelect`). The component at line 212 destructures only `{ obj, activeColumnIDs }` and doesn't reference the old type shape explicitly. The new required `index` field is provided by the `VirtualizedTable` caller, not by this component. Code is forward-compatible.

### Fix 3 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (lines 161, 177)
**Applied.** Removed `pf-v5-u-color-200` from the `className` on both `InfoCircleIcon` instances (lines 160–161 and 176–177). The class has no v6 equivalent. Retained `pf-v6-u-ml-sm` (already migrated in a prior pass).

### Fix 4 — Tooltip behavioral change (line 37)
**No change needed.** This is an informational warning about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default change. No source code modification required; only test files would be affected, and no companion test files were listed.

### Fix 5 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (lines 161, 177)
**Applied (same as Fix 3).** Both fixes target the same two lines and the same class. Handled together with Fix 3.

### Fix 6 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (line 35)
**Applied.** Replaced `TextVariants` import with `ContentVariants` in the import block. Updated the JSX usage at former line 303 from `component={TextVariants.h2}` to `component={ContentVariants.h2}`.

### Fix 7 — `Text` → `Content` (line 36)
**Applied.** Removed `Text` from the import block (replaced by `Content`). Replaced `<Text component={TextVariants.h2}>...</Text>` with the `component` prop moved onto the `<Content>` element (merged with Fix 8 since both `Text` and `TextContent` map to `Content`).

### Fix 8 — `TextContent` → `Content` (line 34)
**Applied.** Removed `TextContent` from the import block, added `Content`. Merged the outer `<TextContent className="pf-v6-u-my-xl">` wrapper and inner `<Text component={TextVariants.h2}>` into a single `<Content className="pf-v6-u-my-xl" component={ContentVariants.h2}>` element, eliminating the unnecessary nesting.
